items.name: foundation
items.title: Nusaiba Foundation
items.description: Motion tokens, design-system UI primitives, brand logos, infinite slider, and button-scale theme. Installed automatically with every block.
items.docs:
## Nusaiba Foundation

Installed automatically when you add any `@nusaiba/*` block.

### Fonts (one-time)

Add Nusaiba typography to your root layout:

```tsx
import { nusaibaFontClassName } from "@/components/nusaiba-font";

<html className={`${nusaibaFontClassName()} h-full antialiased`}>
```

### Brand logos

Header blocks reference `/images/logo-nusaiba-wordmark.png` and `logo-nusaiba-dark.png` — both are copied to `public/images/` by this item. Replace them with your own assets when ready.

items.name: gallery-visuals
items.title: Nusaiba Gallery Visuals
items.description: Shared abstract gallery images copied into public/images/visuals for gallery blocks.

items.name: theme-sera
items.title: Sera Theme
items.description: Sera series design tokens — zero radius, monochrome oklch palette for light and dark mode. Matches `shadcn init --preset b4BnGlQgsa`.

items.name: full-width-divider
items.description: Full-bleed horizontal divider for premium section separation.

items.name: decor-icon
items.description: Corner plus-icon decorator for bordered layouts.

items.name: bubble-background
items.description: Interactive animated gradient bubble background from Animate UI.

items.name: brand-typography
items.description: Brand wordmark fonts and Logo.dev typography helpers.

items.name: faqs-1
items.description: Two-column FAQ with sticky header, scroll-reveal stagger, and registry-native copy.

items.name: faqs-2

items.name: faqs-8

items.name: features-5
